# dashboard-qa

| # | Anti-pattern | Rule | Severity |
|---|--------------|------|----------|
| 1 | KPI without comparison/context | some rule | warning |
| 2 | Too many visuals on one page | some rule | warning |
| 3 | Unclear date context | some rule | warning |
| 4 | Wrong number formats | some rule | warning |
| 5 | Slicers taking too much space | some rule | warning |
| 6 | Table used as the main executive visual | some rule | warning |
| 7 | No visual hierarchy | some rule | warning |
| 8 | Inconsistent branch/category colors | some rule | warning |
| 9 | No tooltip explanation | some rule | warning |
| 10 | Visual using a metric with NO contract | some rule | warning |
| 11 | Visual using an UNMAPPED field | some rule | warning |
| 12 | Background containing dynamic values | some rule | warning |
| 13 | Theme colors overridden randomly per visual | some rule | warning |
